zh.lifeSummary: 當Benjamin Flagg於1662年6月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托時，他的父親Thomas Flegg11659歲，母親Mrs. Mary Flegg44歲。他於1690年9月26日與Experience Childe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1741年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Benjamin Flagg于1662年6月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托时，他的父亲Thomas Flegg11659岁，母亲Mrs. Mary Flegg44岁。他于1690年9月26日与Experience Childe在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1741年5月3日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼伍斯特伍斯特享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Flagg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Middle English flag(ge) ‘turf, sod, block of peat’ (Old Norse flag). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at a place where turves were cut, or toponymic, from a place so named, such as Flagg, Derbyshire. It may also be a nickname for someone who cut turves. Compare Flack .
habitational name from Middle English flagge ‘reed, rush’, for someone who lived in a place characterised by reeds, or perhaps for someone who cut reeds for thatch.
perhaps from Middle English flag(ge) ‘flagstone’ (Old Norse flaga), for someone who lived in a place where flagstones were found or quarried.

variants.name: Flack
meanings: English: from Middle English flak ‘sod, turf, block of peat’ (as found in the placename Flatmoor, in Cambridgeshire, recorded as Flackemore in 1221 ), and hence perhaps a metonymic occupational name for a turf cutter. Compare Flagg 1.

nameMeanings.name: Benjamin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the youngest of the twelve sons of Jacob. His mother Rachel died in giving birth to him, and in her last moments she named him Benoni, meaning ‘son of my sorrow’. His father, however, did not wish him to bear such an ill-omened name, and renamed him Benyamin (Genesis 35:16–18; 42:4). This means either ‘son of the right hand’ or more likely ‘son of the south’ (Hebrew yamin can also mean ‘south’), since Benjamin was the only child of Jacob born in Canaan and not in Mesopotamia to the north. Another tradition is that the second element of the name is a variant of the Hebrew plural noun yamim, which means ‘days’ but is used idiomatically to mean ‘year’ or ‘years’. The name would then mean ‘son of (my) old age’ and refer to the fact that Benjamin was Jacob's youngest child. In the Middle Ages the name was often given to sons whose mothers had died in childbirth. Today it has no such unfortunate associations and it grew enormously in popularity following the release of the film The Graduate ( 1967 ), in which Dustin Hoffman played the role of Benjamin Braddock . It is used in Scotland as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Beathan .

en.lifeSummary: When Benjamin Flagg was born on 25 June 1662, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Thomas Flegg, was 11659 and his mother, Mrs. Mary Flegg, was 44. He married Experience Childe on 26 September 1690, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 3 May 1741, in Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Benjamin Flagg est né le 25 juin 1662, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Thomas Flegg, avait 11659 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Mary Flegg, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Experience Childe le 26 septembre 1690, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mai 1741, à Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 78 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Benjamin Flagg(이)가 1662년 6월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Flegg(은)는 11659세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Mary Flegg(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1690년 9월 26일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 Experience Childe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1741년 5월 3일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 워스스터 워스스터에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Benjamin Flagg nasceu em 25 de junho de 1662, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Thomas Flegg, tinha 11659 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Mary Flegg, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Experience Childe em 26 de setembro de 1690, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de maio de 1741, em Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Benjamin Flagg родился 25 июня 1662 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Thomas Flegg было 11659 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Mary Flegg, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Experience Childe 26 сентября 1690 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 3 мая 1741 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Benjamin Flagg nació el 25 de junio de 1662, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Thomas Flegg, tenía 11659 años y su mamá, Mrs. Mary Flegg, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Experience Childe el 26 de septiembre de 1690, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 3 de mayo de 1741, en Worcester, Worcester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 78 años.
